children.heading: Presidential briefings to Congress
children.label: a Presidential briefings to Congress
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , and periodically thereafter, the President shall provide a briefing to the appropriate congressional committees on efforts to implement this chapter.February 18, 2016

children.heading: Report from Secretary of State
children.label: b Report from Secretary of State

children.text: is based on a full and complete interagency review of current policies and possible alternatives, including with respect to North Korea’s weapons of mass destruction and missile programs, human rights atrocities, and significant activities undermining cybersecurity; and
includes recommendations for such legislative or administrative action as the Secretary considers appropriate based on the results of the review.
